questions.question: Measurement of isozyme activity is widely used for diagnostic purposes. Which of the statements is isozymes characteristic?
options: Physically distinct and separable forms of one enzyme differing by composition and properties, but catalyzing the same reaction
Fractions of the same enzyme separated from different organisms
The enzymes acting on different substrates

questions.question: Enzymes possess thermolability. How does the enzyme reaction velocity change at increasing temperature?
options: It increases from 0 up to 37-40° C then it decreases
